contradictions.claim_text: Nobody in Luxembourg offers this format.
contradictions.resolution: Drop the empty-market positioning. Public Luxembourg course pages already show face-to-face generative-AI and ChatGPT business training with practical workshop elements.
contradictions.why_it_matters: The product cannot be released with a 'nobody offers this' claim. Any differentiation story must be narrower and evidence-backed.

falsification_searches.result: Returned public House of Training course pages showing practical ChatGPT business training.
Returned House of Training generative-AI fundamentals and related ChatGPT toolbox offers.

falsification_searches.query: "Luxembourg" approved training provider continuing vocational training
falsification_searches.result: Returned official Guichet and lifelong-learning/INFPC pages showing a real approval/business-permit route for local training bodies.
